headline: Boston Scientific (BSX) Recalls Put Focus On Whether The Stock Still Looks Undervalued
summary: Recall driven attention on Boston Scientific stock Boston Scientific (BSX) is back in focus after a series of voluntary recalls for its CRE and CRE Pro Wireguided gastrointestinal devices, tied to potential sterile pouch breaches across widely distributed product lots. With more than 81,000 units cited in individual recall notices and a worldwide distribution footprint, the situation brings product quality controls, potential regulatory implications and timing before the upcoming earnings...

headline: Boston Scientific (BSX) Stock Still Looks Undervalued Following Its 58% Slump
summary: Boston Scientific stock has had a tough run over the past year, yet the valuation checks still lean supportive, setting up a clear tension between recent share price weakness and what the broader metrics suggest about value. Boston Scientific shares are down about 58.1% over the past year, which sharply resets expectations around what investors are willing to pay for the business. Upcoming earnings and progress integrating recent device acquisitions may support sentiment, while ongoing Class...
